visualizations.title: Percentage Increase Multiplier Formula
visualizations.description: The formula to calculate the final increased value in a single multiplication step.

steps.explanation: Add the percentage in decimal form to 1 (representing 100% of the original amount).
Multiply the original quantity by the resulting multiplier to get the new total.

visualizations.title: Increasing a Value of 80 by 25%
visualizations.description: Visualizing how a 25% increase appends an extra fourth of the original bar to the end.
